methods.description: Statistical method used to analyze differences in allergen-specific IgE test values between OAS (+) and OAS (−) groups.

steps.description: Differences in allergen-specific IgE test values between the OAS (+) and OAS (−) groups were analyzed using the Mann-Whitney U test.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Mann-Whitney U test on IgE test values
inputs: allergen-specific IgE test values for OAS (+) group
allergen-specific IgE test values for OAS (−) group

steps.description: Mann-Whitney U test was performed using GraphPad Prism version 7.03 for Windows, GraphPad Software, La Jolla California USA, www.graph pad.com.
steps.searchable_summary: use GraphPad Prism to perform Mann-Whitney U test

methods.description: Receiver operating characteristics (ROC) curve analysis to evaluate the diagnostic accuracy of allergen-specific IgE tests.

steps.description: Receiver operating characteristics (ROC) curve analysis was carried out on the diagnostic accuracy of the allergen-specific IgE tests.
steps.searchable_summary: perform ROC curve analysis on IgE test diagnostic accuracy

steps.description: The ROC curve analysis was performed using SPSS Statistics ver. 25 (IBM Corporation).
steps.searchable_summary: use SPSS Statistics to perform ROC curve analysis
